response.justification: Despite broad experience across languages and domains, the candidate shows minimal direct exposure to Java/Kotlin, JVM tooling, Spring ecosystem, or IDE internals — critical for this role. His Java experience is only mentioned in passing (e.g., robotic arms, device orchestration) without evidence of enterprise framework or build tool integration work, and his recent roles focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, not JVM-based tooling.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems in distributed environments
concerns: Lack of demonstrated deep expertise in Java/Kotlin or JVM internals
No evidence of work with Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus, or enterprise build tools
Recent focus is on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, not IDE or language tooling
